description: CRITICAL TEST: v0 changed from h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) to h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY). Testing hypothesis that GOAWAY/disconnect forces TCP flush, making warning visible. If warning renders, confirms the keep-alive flush issue as root cause for ALL h2_mode=2 services.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads (→v0.app redirect). Submit SSN keyword. CRITICAL: Check if warning message or error page appears now (h2_mode changed from 2→1). Compare with #366 result (STUCK_ON_THINKING). If an error/warning appears, the GOAWAY flush hypothesis is confirmed.
services.notes: h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY), h2_end_stream=1, h2_hold_request=0. Connection will be torn down after block response.

notes: Root cause test: h2_mode=2 keep-alive suspected of NOT flushing TCP send buffer after write_visible_data. h2_mode=1 GOAWAY forces on_disconnected() which flushes buffer. If this test shows warning/error, we need to add explicit TCP flush for h2_mode=2.
